meaning: n.(高等)专科院校,研究院,学会,学术团体,学院
examples: The Academy Awards appear to validate his career.
The academy is far more inclusive now than it used to be.
The movie won nine Academy Awards, including Best Picture.
Pupils at the Priory Ruskin Academy in Grantham, Lincolnshire, have a variety of revision techniques.
In the past, the documentary category has been the Academy s biggest source of grievance.
